task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy GUI showing the case name 'Spoliation_Investigation_2024' and case number 'INV-WIPE-001' in the title bar, case properties, or new case wizard.

task_completion.description: Add the disk image and run the 'File Type Identification' ingest module
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy tree view showing 'wiped_evidence.dd' as a data source, and the ingest module configuration or progress bar showing 'File Type Identification' selected/running.

task_completion.description: Identify deleted files and inspect their payloads to classify as WIPED_ZERO, WIPED_FF, or INTACT
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy interface showing deleted files selected in the result viewer, with the 'Hex' tab open in the content viewer displaying blocks of 00s, FFs, or intact file data.
A text editor or terminal output showing the contents of 'wiping_analysis.csv' with the exact header 'FILENAME|SIZE_BYTES|PAYLOAD_STATUS' and pipe-delimited rows classifying the deleted files.

A text editor or terminal output showing 'spoliation_summary.txt' containing the total number of deleted files (9), the count for each status category (3 of each), and a brief assessment of intentional data destruction.

integrity.description: Agent used the Autopsy GUI to actually inspect the files rather than guessing or hallucinating the file statuses.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the agent actively clicking through deleted files in Autopsy and viewing their Hex contents.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the forensic tool by writing a script to blindly generate the output files without analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal commands that simply echo or script the final CSV/TXT files without prior Autopsy interaction.

integrity.description: Agent saved the reports in the exact requested directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: File manager or terminal showing the files are located specifically in '/home/ga/Reports/'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Case Name: Spoliation_Investigation_2024. Case Number: INV-WIPE-001. Disk Image: /home/ga/evidence/wiped_evidence.dd. There are exactly 9 deleted files to analyze. 3 are INTACT (notes.txt, passwords.log, itinerary.doc), 3 are WIPED_ZERO (bank_statements.csv, crypto_keys.txt, contacts.db), and 3 are WIPED_FF (tax_returns.pdf, offshore_accounts.xlsx, incriminating_photo.jpg). The CSV report must be at /home/ga/Reports/wiping_analysis.csv and the summary at /home/ga/Reports/spoliation_summary.txt.
